assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might use AddServerSideSessions() and separately configure EF, or not know the exact method name

assertions.assertion: Configures UseSqlServer with the connection string from configuration
assertions.rationale: UseSqlServer with GetConnectionString is standard EF Core knowledge
Without skill, an LLM might not know the exact option name SessionCleanupInterval or where to configure it
AddSessionCleanupBackgroundProcess() is a v4-specific method; without skill an LLM would likely use EnableSessionCleanup (v3) or not know this exists

assertions.assertion: Warns against or does NOT use in-memory sessions for production
assertions.rationale: General best practice knowledge would include warning about in-memory storage for production
